title: Uniface Messages 5000-5999
text: Uniface Messages 5000-5999 Refer to the Uniface message number, message text, and an explanation of the message. The following table refers to messages with numbering between 5000 - 5999 . Search: Column Message number Message text Explanation Filter results... 33 rows found Message number Message text Explanation Filter 33 rows found Filter 33 rows found Filter 33 rows found Message number Message text Explanation 5001 Store error [%%$$UP_MESS1]. See the message frame for more information and the returned error codes for store . 5002 Commit failed [%%$$UP_MESS1]. See the message frame for more information and review the returned error codes for commit . 5003 Rollback failed [%%$$UP_MESS1]. Check the message frame and review the returned error codes for rollback . 5004 Retrieve failed [%%$$UP_MESS1]. Check the message frame and refer to the returned error codes for retrieve . 5005 No occurrences retrieved. No occurrences that matched your profile were found, or no existing occurrence are available for retrieval. 5006 Phase 1 of 2: Counting occurrences of entity %%$$UP_MESS1 of %%$$UP_MESS2. When you upgrade your repository, Uniface first counts the number of records to be processed. 5007 More than one %%$$UP_MESS1 found. You entered a nonunique value and therefore retrieved more than one occurrence of the specified object. Enter a unique value. 5008 %%$$UP_MESS1 already exists. The object you defined already exists. Specify another name for the object. 5009 %%$$UP_MESS1 does not exist. The object you specified does not exist. Check that you entered the name correctly. 5010 Table %%$$UP_MESS2 for %%$$UP_MESS1 does not exist. You entered a nonexistent table. Check that you entered the name correctly. 5011 Unexpected retrieve/o status [%%$$UP_MESS3] on object %%$$UP_MESS1, table %%$$UP_MESS2%%%. The retrieve/o statement failed. 5012 Unexpected retrieve/x status [%%$$UP_MESS3] on object %%$$UP_MESS1, table %%$$UP_MESS2%%%. The retrieve/x statement failed. 5013 Close without generating script? You tried to leave the Create Script form without generating any SQL. Click OK to leave or Cancel to return to the form. 5014 Phase 2 of 2: %%$$UP_MESS1 % of %%$$UP_MESS2 occurrences processed. Elapsed time: %%$$UP_MESS3. When upgrading your repository, the second phase of the process performs the upgrade to all entities in your repository. 5016 Value must be in the range 1 - 10000. You entered an incorrect scaling percentage for your image. The scale must be within the range 1-10000 for the image to be displayed on the command button. 5301 Data has been modified. Do you want to exit this application? Click Save to save the modified data before closing the application. Click Exit to close the application without saving the data. 5302 No library specified. Cannot verify if %%$$UP_MESS1 exists. You must specify a library first. 5306 No hits in this context. No objects to match your profile for the given context were found. 5307 <ADD/INSERT OCCURRENCE> not allowed. The ^ADD_OCC or ^INS_OCC structure editor functions are not available in the current context. 5308 Remove Occurrence not allowed. The ^REM_OCC structure editor function is not available in the current context. 5309 No context (%%$$UP_MESS1) available. You tried to define an entity, but an application model for that entity is not defined. First define the parent model before you create your entities. 5500 Active group %%$$UP_MESS1 does not have %%$$UP_MESS2 permission for function category %%$$UP_MESS3. The current active group does not give you permission to use this function. 5801 Unexpected program error [%%$$UP_MESS1]. Contact your Uniface representative. 5802 Form %%$$UP_MESS1 not found. The specified form could not be started. Check your assignment file and your environment setup to locate the problem. 5803 Unexpected retrieve/o status [%%$$UP_MESS1]. See the message frame for more information, and check the returned error codes for retrieve/o . 5804 Data has been modified. Do you want to quit this form? If you click Quit , the data you modified is not saved. 5805 Data has been modified. Do you want to save before you continue? You have modified the data in the current form and want to open another form. If you click Continue , the form remains open and the data remains unsaved. Click Save to save your data before continuing. 5806 Do you really want to clear? You chose Clear after modifying data, so your changes will not be saved. Click OK to clear or Cancel to go back and save your changes. 5807 Save this object before removing it. You tried to remove a modified occurrence. You must save the object before you can remove it. 5808 Do you want to add this %%$$UP_MESS1 first? Do you want to create the specified object before closing the form? Click Yes to create the object. 5809 You must save this %%$$UP_MESS1 under its current name first. Save the current object first before using Save As . 5810 Action completed. Modifications : %%$$UP_MESS1, warnings : %%$$UP_MESS2, errors : %%$$UP_MESS3. See the message frame for more information. 5811 The request failed because object %%$$UP_MESS1 could not be saved. The action could not be performed because of a store error. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
